Class DataItemTests

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.controller.ResultFunctionalityTests
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.controller.DataItemTests
Direct Known Subclasses:
AcribisDataItemTests, BctDataItemTests, CovidInfluenzaDataItemTests, KidsRadarDataItemTests
public abstract class DataItemTests extends ResultFunctionalityTests

  • Method Details

    • getTreatmentDataItem

      protected DiseaseDataItem getTreatmentDataItem(DataItemContext context, String dataItem)

    • getDataAsIntegerList

      protected List<Integer> getDataAsIntegerList(DataItemContext context, String dataType)
      Helper method to safely retrieve and cast treatment data.
      Parameters:
      context - The treatment category (e.g., COVID).
      dataType - The specific cumulative age type.
      Returns:
      A list of integers representing the cumulative age data.

    • assertTreatmentLevel

      protected void assertTreatmentLevel(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem, Integer outpatient, Integer normalWard, Integer icu, Integer icuVentilation, Integer icuEcmo)
      Asserts the treatment level data for a specific context.
      Parameters:
      context - The data item context.
      normalWard - The expected value for normal ward treatment.
      icu - The expected value for ICU treatment.
      icuVentilation - The expected value for ICU ventilation treatment.
      icuEcmo - The expected value for ICU ECMO treatment.

    • assertTreatmentLevelKiradarPed

      protected void assertTreatmentLevelKiradarPed(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem, Integer icuVentilation, Integer icuEcmo, Integer normalWard, Integer icu, Integer icuHighFlow, Integer icuCpap)
      Asserts the pediatric (KiRadar) treatment level data for a specific context.

      This method verifies that the treatment level values stored in the data item match the expected values for pediatric patients in the given context.

      Parameters:
      context - The data item context.
      selectedDataItem - The identifier of the selected data item.
      icuVentilation - The expected value for invasive ventilation treatment.
      icuEcmo - The expected value for ECMO treatment.
      normalWard - The expected value for normal ward treatment.
      icu - The expected value for ICU treatment (general).
      icuHighFlow - The expected value for high-flow oxygen treatment.
      icuCpap - The expected value for CPAP treatment.

    • assertCumulativeResults

      protected void assertCumulativeResults(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem, int positive, int borderlineSuspected, int negative)

    • assertCumulativeGender

      protected void assertCumulativeGender(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem, int male, int female, int diverse)

    • assertListExactly

      protected void assertListExactly(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem, List<?> expected)
      Asserts that the list contained in the DiseaseDataItem for the given context/key is exactly identical to expected: same size, same elements, in the same order.

      Order matters. Pass a List as expected to avoid nondeterministic iteration from unordered collections (e.g., HashSet).

      Parameters:
      context - data item context used to retrieve the item under test
      selectedDataItem - key/name passed to getTreatmentDataItem(...)
      expected - expected list in exact order (duplicates preserved)
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if the data is null, not a List, sizes differ, or any element differs

    • assertListIsSortedAscending

      protected void assertListIsSortedAscending(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem)

    • assertTimelineValueByDay

      protected void assertTimelineValueByDay(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem, Long timeStamp, long sum)

    • assertTimelineValueByDay

      protected void assertTimelineValueByDay(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem, Long timeStamp, long sum, TreatmentLevels treatmentLevel)

    • assertTimelineValueByDay

      protected void assertTimelineValueByDay(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem, Long timeStamp, long sum, String treatmentLevel)
      Asserts the timeline value for a specific treatment level on a given day.

      This method verifies that the timeline data for the provided treatment level and timestamp matches the expected sum value.

      Parameters:
      context - The data item context.
      selectedDataItem - The identifier of the selected data item.
      timeStamp - The timestamp (day) for which the value should be asserted.
      sum - The expected aggregated value at the given timestamp.
      treatmentLevel - The treatment level (as string key) to check the value for.

    • assertListIsEmpty

      protected void assertListIsEmpty(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem)

    • assertListSize

      protected void assertListSize(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem, Integer expectedSize)

      protected void assertListContains(DataItemContext context, String selectedDataItem, Long expectedValue)
